text: How did you make the video?
author: @binarypench

text:
The video was recorded using a DS emulator called DeSmuME.
My Freefly Camera code was used for every scene in the video.

First scene was simple. I just placed some bananas and drove into them.

Second scene I made myself constantly accelerate at a low value, then I forced an off screen CPU to use a bullet bill.

Third scene I made every character into Toad with his standard kart, simultaneously controlled all of them, and froze Waluigi Pinball. I unfroze WP once I'd gotten enough footage and let the flipper hit them. You can actually the point where I unfroze WP if you look at the slots in the top left.

Fourth scene I took control of the CPU Shyguys, and positioned them underneath the Thwomp. I forced a constant spin on one of them, and controlled the other one to make him hop. I also froze Bowser Castle until I got enough footage.

Fifth scene I forced the CPU's to respawn. Then off screen, I placed a Bob-omb and drove out of the shot. I also had to quickly move the camera while doing this. I had to time this all perfectly. It took a number of tries to get it right.

Sixth scene I positioned all of the CPU's accordingly. At first I controlled only Daisy, after that, I disabled controls for Daisy and controlled everybody else. I give them all different items and just spammed them.  This was supposed to take place in DK Pass, but something went wrong while setting up. That idea in DK Pass got reused in my other video Yet another random video. .

Seventh scene was simple. Just placed a banana and a fake item box and let the pinball hit me when it came off the rails.

Eighth scene was also simple. Just drove forward and when I got near the pendulum, I speed it up.

The whole video included heavy use of Cheat Engine and codes specifically made for it.
